## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX's content strategy and platform capabilities for potential collaboration with CoachList.](https://fathom.video/share/E7S-5sTSgCPuCW-jpp--mwLysqeMZGT8?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers a comprehensive content strategy and creation process, including a 6-8 week strategy sprint and ongoing content production](https://fathom.video/share/E7S-5sTSgCPuCW-jpp--mwLysqeMZGT8?tab=summary&timestamp=63.0)
  - [Their proprietary platform combines AI-powered workflows with human expertise for efficient, high-quality content creation](https://fathom.video/share/E7S-5sTSgCPuCW-jpp--mwLysqeMZGT8?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)
  - [GrowthX can handle various content needs, including SEO optimization, GEO (Generative Engine Optimization), and potentially help desk articles](https://fathom.video/share/E7S-5sTSgCPuCW-jpp--mwLysqeMZGT8?tab=summary&timestamp=1370.0)
  - [Pricing starts at $30K for the strategy sprint, with ongoing engagements ranging from $15K-$25K/month](https://fathom.video/share/E7S-5sTSgCPuCW-jpp--mwLysqeMZGT8?tab=summary&timestamp=2271.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Content Strategy Process

  - [Begins with a 6-8 week strategy sprint ($30K) to develop deep understanding of client's business, personas, and content needs](https://fathom.video/share/E7S-5sTSgCPuCW-jpp--mwLysqeMZGT8?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [Creates artifacts like persona profiles, writing guidelines, and content strategies](https://fathom.video/share/E7S-5sTSgCPuCW-jpp--mwLysqeMZGT8?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [Develops a "Content OS" with 1000+ content opportunities organized by themes and priorities](https://fathom.video/share/E7S-5sTSgCPuCW-jpp--mwLysqeMZGT8?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)
  - [No obligation to continue after strategy sprint, but artifacts provide valuable inputs for future content creation](https://fathom.video/share/E7S-5sTSgCPuCW-jpp--mwLysqeMZGT8?tab=summary&timestamp=2210.0)

### GrowthX's Proprietary Platform

  - [Combines AI-powered workflows with human expertise](https://fathom.video/share/E7S-5sTSgCPuCW-jpp--mwLysqeMZGT8?tab=summary&timestamp=607.0)
  - [Features include:](https://fathom.video/share/E7S-5sTSgCPuCW-jpp--mwLysqeMZGT8?tab=summary&timestamp=612.0)
      - [Content pipelines for different use cases (e.g., article generation, content refreshing)](https://fathom.video/share/E7S-5sTSgCPuCW-jpp--mwLysqeMZGT8?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
      - [Workflow engine for rapid execution of content creation steps](https://fathom.video/share/E7S-5sTSgCPuCW-jpp--mwLysqeMZGT8?tab=summary&timestamp=802.0)
      - [Integration with tools like SEMrush and ChatGPT](https://fathom.video/share/E7S-5sTSgCPuCW-jpp--mwLysqeMZGT8?tab=summary&timestamp=774.0)
      - [Fact-checking, SEO optimization, and image creation capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/E7S-5sTSgCPuCW-jpp--mwLysqeMZGT8?tab=summary&timestamp=1133.0)
  - [Allows for quick edits and iterations without rerunning entire workflows](https://fathom.video/share/E7S-5sTSgCPuCW-jpp--mwLysqeMZGT8?tab=summary&timestamp=947.0)

### SEO and GEO Capabilities

  - [Comprehensive SEO services including technical audits, meta tag recommendations, and internal linking strategies](https://fathom.video/share/E7S-5sTSgCPuCW-jpp--mwLysqeMZGT8?tab=summary&timestamp=1148.0)
  - [GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) focus to improve visibility in AI-powered search engines](https://fathom.video/share/E7S-5sTSgCPuCW-jpp--mwLysqeMZGT8?tab=summary&timestamp=1375.0)
  - [Tracking and analysis of brand mentions and citations in AI-generated content](https://fathom.video/share/E7S-5sTSgCPuCW-jpp--mwLysqeMZGT8?tab=summary&timestamp=1450.0)

### Potential Content Strategies for CoachList

  - [Editorial focus on parents/athletes at different life stages, addressing key questions about sports and training](https://fathom.video/share/E7S-5sTSgCPuCW-jpp--mwLysqeMZGT8?tab=summary&timestamp=1780.0)
  - [Content aimed at coaches to help them grow their businesses](https://fathom.video/share/E7S-5sTSgCPuCW-jpp--mwLysqeMZGT8?tab=summary&timestamp=1806.0)
  - [Geo-specific content strategy, similar to online travel agencies' approach](https://fathom.video/share/E7S-5sTSgCPuCW-jpp--mwLysqeMZGT8?tab=summary&timestamp=1926.0)

### Pricing and Engagement Structure

  - [Strategy sprint: $30K for 6-8 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/E7S-5sTSgCPuCW-jpp--mwLysqeMZGT8?tab=summary&timestamp=2271.0)
  - [Ongoing engagement: $15K-$25K per month, depending on volume and complexity](https://fathom.video/share/E7S-5sTSgCPuCW-jpp--mwLysqeMZGT8?tab=summary&timestamp=2277.0)
  - [Estimated $15K/month for CoachList based on initial assessment](https://fathom.video/share/E7S-5sTSgCPuCW-jpp--mwLysqeMZGT8?tab=summary&timestamp=2288.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send SOW (Statement of Work) to CoachList](https://fathom.video/share/E7S-5sTSgCPuCW-jpp--mwLysqeMZGT8?tab=summary&timestamp=2508.0)
  - [Jeff to review SOW and consider next steps](https://fathom.video/share/E7S-5sTSgCPuCW-jpp--mwLysqeMZGT8?tab=summary&timestamp=2483.0)
  - [Potential follow-up meeting next week to discuss further](https://fathom.video/share/E7S-5sTSgCPuCW-jpp--mwLysqeMZGT8?tab=summary&timestamp=2495.0)
  - [Aim to potentially start engagement in early August, subject to availability](https://fathom.video/share/E7S-5sTSgCPuCW-jpp--mwLysqeMZGT8?tab=summary&timestamp=2456.0)
